re_edit_thrash:RECURRING:STABLE — units 060367c5-17,060367c5-42,bc2715fa-14; unit 060367c5-17: 4 Edit calls on DEPLOY.md plus 2 on main.rs plus 2 on dashboard.rs with interleaved Reads and rg-via-Bash anchors; unit 060367c5-42: 11 Edit calls on dashboard.rs across two interleaved sub-sequences separated by cargo check plus 2 Edit calls on mod.rs; unit bc2715fa-14: 3 Edit failures on with-server.ts across non-consecutive attempts plus 4 Edits on console-sink.ts plus 3 Edits on route-wrapper.server.utils.ts plus 1 Edit failure on crab-sink-shared.test.ts; 060367c5-42 peak Edit count on a single file (11 on dashboard.rs in one unit) is the highest single-unit-single-file count observed across all measured cycles; no improvement trend across 17+ consecutive cycles

path_assumption_bias:RECURRING:STABLE — units bc2715fa-5 and bc2715fa-7; unit bc2715fa-5: first Bash target uses cd frontend && rg compound which fails (success=false), then rg directly against src without correct prefix also fails (success=false), then pwd discovery and ls before correct path resolved; unit bc2715fa-7: first Bash tool targets src/utils/app-init.utils.ts and src/utils/with-server.ts with wrong relative path (success=false) before ls pivot finds correct location; double-instance count matches stable baseline; cross-session internalization remains zero across 21+ consecutive sessions

declared_ready_without_runtime_exercise:RECURRING:CONFIRMED — unit bc2715fa-14 repeated the pattern from the immediately prior calibration cycle: declared crab-sink server/client split complete after ts:build clean and vitest passing without dev server verification; unit bc2715fa-18 documents the failure outcome (import 'server-only' pulled into client SSR via conditional-lazy-import topology) and appends a detailed mistake-pattern entry; pattern classified NEW in the prior calibration cycle is now CONFIRMED RECURRING; self-documentation ritual executed correctly in bc2715fa-18 but violation reflex is uncorrected; violates dream insight conf=0.78 (never assert state without observation)

trusted_linter_reminder_without_diffing:NEW — unit bc2715fa-22: agent received a system-reminder that logger/index.ts was modified by a linter and accepted the modification without running git diff HEAD -- <file>; the linter-attributed change had flipped LOGGER_ENABLED from default-on (!== '0') to default-off (=== 'true'), silently disabling server logging; bug surfaced only via test failure (logger.demo.test.ts) during a diagnostic pass initiated for an unrelated reason; agent then ran git stash diagnostic and git diff to identify the root cause, confirmed the behavioral flip, fixed it, and appended a new mistake-pattern entry; self-correction and ritual both executed correctly; not present in any prior calibration history entry; cross-references dream insight conf=0.78 (accepting a linter-attributed file change without reading the delta is asserting state without observation)
cross_references: dream insight conf=0.78 (never assert state without observation): VIOLATED in bc2715fa-14 (declared crab-sink ready without dev-server observation); VIOLATED AGAIN in bc2715fa-22 (accepted linter-attributed file modification without diffing, missed behavioral flag inversion from default-on to default-off)

dream insight conf=0.55 (after /catchup flag unverified state assumptions with [unverified from prior session]): units 060367c5-0 and bc2715fa-2 are both session-start catchup units; neither shows explicit unverified-assumption flagging before acting on reconstructed state; consistent with prior cycles — this insight has not been operationalized

dream insight conf=0.61 (treat user message brevity as context-budget signal): unit 060367c5-42 responds to a 46-character input with 21 tool calls and 4822-character output; unit bc2715fa-22 responds to a 59-character input with 24 tool calls and 4396-character output; execution depth is appropriate given task complexity but output length exceeds what the brevity signal implies
recommendations: trusted_linter_reminder_without_diffing is a NEW pattern requiring immediate operationalization: before continuing past any system-reminder reporting 'file was modified by linter or user — this change was intentional', run git diff HEAD -- <file> and read the actual delta; if the delta contains operator changes, constant swaps, boolean inversions, or return-type changes it is a behavioral regression not a formatting change — treat it as a bug to investigate before proceeding

declared_ready_without_runtime_exercise is now CONFIRMED RECURRING across two consecutive cycles; the mistake-pattern file has been written twice and the pattern has not been internalized; the pre-completion gate for frontend changes must include: dev server started AND specific page exercising the modified code path loaded in a real browser; if the dev server cannot be launched from the agent shell, say so explicitly and name the specific page the user must load before pushing — never substitute ts:build plus vitest as a proxy for runtime correctness

060367c5-42 reveals a new sub-variant of re_edit_thrash: 11 Edit calls on a single file (dashboard.rs) in one unit, exceeding all prior peak single-file edit counts; at Edit attempt 4+ on the same file without an intervening full Read, stop and re-read the complete current file state before continuing — speculative incremental edits without a complete model of the required change are the mechanistic cause

shell_tool_preference_violations and re_edit_thrash show zero improvement across 34+ and 17+ consecutive cycles respectively and recommendations for these have been repeated in every prior calibration entry; deprioritize repeating the same fix guidance until the root tool-selection mechanism changes
